  • Classes in org.episteme.core.mathematics.analysis used by org.episteme.core.mathematics.analysis
    Class
    Description
    Bijection
    A bijective function (one-to-one and onto mapping).
    ContinuousFunction
    Represents a continuous function.
    DifferentiableFunction
    Represents a differentiable function.
    Function
    Represents a mathematical function from a domain D to a codomain C.
    IntegrableFunction
    Represents an integrable function.
    RealFunction
    Represents a real-valued function of a real variable (R -> R).
    Relation
    Represents a binary relation between a domain D and a codomain C.
    ScalarField
    Represents a scalar field: f: ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚ВќГѓВўГ‚ВЃГ‚Вї ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚Вќ
    ScalarFunction
    Scalar-valued function (returns a single real number).
    VectorField
    Represents a vector field: F: ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚ВќГѓВўГ‚ВЃГ‚Вї ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў ГѓВўГўв‚¬ЕѕГ‚ВќГѓВўГ‚ВЃГ‚Вї
